results.description: Open-source GEO content engineering and multi-site distribution system with AI tasks, RAG/semantic chunking, analytics, GEOFlow Agent and WordPress target publishing.
A-RAG: Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Hierarchical Retrieval Interfaces. State-of-the-art RAG framework with keyword, semantic, and chunk read tools for multi-hop QA.
Local-first, zero-key semantic code search for large and custom codebases — hybrid vector + keyword retrieval with symbol-aware chunking. Usable as a CLI, Python library, REST API, or web UI.

Fast, AI-agent-native code search in Rust — hybrid BM25 + semantic, Tree-sitter AST chunking, dependency & impact analysis. Drop-in replacement for grep/cat/read/ls in Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Aider, OpenHands.
Completely local RAG. Chat with your PDF documents (with open LLM) and UI to that uses LangChain, Streamlit, Ollama (Llama 3.1), Qdrant and advanced methods like reranking and semantic chunking.

RAG boilerplate with semantic/propositional chunking, hybrid search (BM25 + dense), LLM reranking, query enhancement agents, CrewAI orchestration, Qdrant vector search, Redis/Mongo sessioning, Celery ingestion pipeline, Gradio UI, and an evaluation suite (Hit-Rate, MRR, hybrid configs).
Enterprise RAG ecosystem managing 15,000+ semantic chunks. Features hybrid parsing (LlamaParse/PyMuPDF) and 256-dim MRL embeddings for 512MB RAM environments

An advanced retrieval system that combines semantic vector search with token-based search, using contextual chunking and knowledge graphs to improve accuracy. It ensures precise query responses with LLM-based answer checking and graph visualization.
Reliable RAG setup that uses Semantic Double Merging Chunking from llamaindex, Qdrant Hybrid Search, colBERT for reranking and Google Gemini as LLM.
Embedding-driven, context-aware text chunking for Semantic Kernel and RAG workflows in .NET
MCP-native code retrieval for AI agents — 84-88% fewer read tokens, BM25F + semantic search, AST chunks, session dedup
Cutting-edge tool that unlocks the full potential of semantic chunking
Semantic code search and RAG system written in Rust with tree-sitter chunking, MCP server for IDE integration, prompt injection detection, and secret redaction

This project leverages Language Model (LLM) finetuning, Semantic Chunking, and a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based Chatbot framework to provide personalized medical information retrieval for remote patients in the Healthcare 5.0 era.

🚀 Introducing the Hybrid RAG . A powerful set of tools for NLP, text chunking, semantic analysis, and RAG-based question answering, focused on Spanish texts. Combine classical retrieval with modern embedding techniques! 🌟 #RAG #NLP #AI
Local-first, zero-key semantic code search for large and custom codebases — hybrid vector + keyword retrieval with symbol-aware chunking. Usable as a CLI, Python library, REST API, or web UI.

TreeSearch: Search your codebase like a human — not like a vector database. No embeddings. No chunking. Just millisecond search over structured documents and large codebases. 无需 embedding，无需切分文档，在结构化文档和大型代码库中实现毫秒级检索。

The GPT-RAG Data Ingestion service automates processing of diverse documents—PDFs, images, spreadsheets, transcripts, and SharePoint—readying them for Azure AI Search. It applies smart chunking, generates text and image embeddings, and enables rich, multimodal retrieval.
Pure Rust PDF library for AI/RAG: structure-aware chunking, no ML, no C deps.
PDFStract - Extract, Chunking and Embedding Layer in Your RAG Pipeline - Available as CLI - WEBUI - API

Fast, AI-agent-native code search in Rust — hybrid BM25 + semantic, Tree-sitter AST chunking, dependency & impact analysis. Drop-in replacement for grep/cat/read/ls in Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Aider, OpenHands.
Deprecated/unmaintained Postgres extensions to support end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines
The RAG Genie, an LLM RAG prototype to test and evaluate your embeddings, chunk splitting strategies using Q&A and evaluations.
Enterprise RAG ecosystem managing 15,000+ semantic chunks. Features hybrid parsing (LlamaParse/PyMuPDF) and 256-dim MRL embeddings for 512MB RAM environments
Embedding-driven, context-aware text chunking for Semantic Kernel and RAG workflows in .NET
MCP-native code retrieval for AI agents — 84-88% fewer read tokens, BM25F + semantic search, AST chunks, session dedup
This tool allows you to search ArXiv for scientific papers, extract their content, embed and chunk the text, and ask questions about them using GPT-4o
Local-first RAG evaluation workbench — compare embedding models, visualize chunk similarity heatmaps and   vector projections, tune retrieval strategies side by side
⚡ Cut Claude token usage by 90%+ — free, open-source, local-first context compression for Claude Code. Hybrid RAG (BM25 + ONNX vectors), AST chunking, reranking. No API needed.

RAG system built with .NET 10, React, Qdrant, and OpenAI. Upload PDF, DOCX, and text files - automatically extract, chunk, and embed content into a vector store. Ask questions via chat and get AI-generated answers grounded in your uploaded documents with cited sources.
Easy-to-Use RAG Framework; CCF AIOps International Challenge 2024 Top3 Solution; CCF AIOps 国际挑战赛 2024 季军方案
Multi-strategy RAG system achieving 74% Recall@10 on MultiHop-RAG. Combines RAPTOR hierarchical retrieval, knowledge graphs, HyDE, BM25, and Cohere neural reranking.

The most advanced Obsidian MCP — long-term memory for AI agents. Hybrid retrieval (BM25 + ML + BGE rerank, RRF-fused), HNSW live-update, agentic RAG (HyDE + sub-question), Obsidian Bases, PDFs+OCR. For Claude Code/Desktop, Cursor, ChatGPT, Codex, OpenClaw. MCP-native, MIT, SLSA L2.

本项目是一套完整的检索增强生成（Retrieval-Augmented Generation, RAG）技术实现方案，包含21个专题笔记本，覆盖从基础实现到高级优化的全技术栈。通过模块化设计，开发者可以系统性地掌握**RAG核心组件及其进阶技巧**，包括**多粒度分块策略（语义/命题/上下文分块）、混合检索引擎（向量+关键词融合）、动态上下文管理（压缩/扩展/重组）、智能查询理解（重写/退步/分解）、假设文档嵌入（HyDE）技术、自适应检索路由（问题类型感知）、自优化反馈循环（Self-RAG）、实时纠错机制（CRAG）、强化学习调优（RL RAG）、多模态处理（文本+图像联合检索）、知识图谱增强（Graph RAG）、分层索引优化（十亿级文档支持）等核心技术亮点

A local Neuro-Symbolic RAG agent inspired by Apple's CLaRa. Built with the "2026 Stack" (DSPy, LangGraph, Ollama), it features Hybrid Memory (Vector + Knowledge Graph), HyDE retrieval, and self-correcting web search fallback.
Advanced Agentic GraphRAG system with ZenML MLOps, HyDE, cross-encoder reranking, Small-to-Big hierarchical retrieval, and full cloud finetuning/evaluation on SageMaker.

A genral RAG Search chatbot, with SoTA RAG techniques such as HyDE, Hybrid retrieval with BM25 + RRF and Cross encoder reranking. Evaluated on the BEIR scifact dataset and compared all the different pipelines i tried along the way
Hypothetical Document Embeddings for Precision Retrieval
🌊 Multimodal RAG with HyDE-powered retrieval
An end to end implementation of HyDE RAG using the concept of multi-stage LLM generation.
LangChain RAG tutorial: document loaders, embeddings, retrieval, reranking, HyDE, RRF, multi-query
Loading, Embedding, Retrieval - Query rewriting, HyDE, Context re-ranking, Routing
Combines HyDE-generated hypotheses, retrieval-augmented generation, and cache-augmented generation for faster, more accurate answers.
Production-grade RAG pipeline: hybrid BM25 + dense retrieval, HyDE, LLM reranking, intent-aware answer shaping — FastAPI + Mistral AI

This repository documents a modular, containerized personal showcase agent that evaluates Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Hypothetical Document Embeddings (HyDE) on compact LLMs. It is designed to act as an AI representative of Andrejs Sorstkins (AI Engineer), answering questions about his CV, experience, and project portfolio.
Corrective RAG demo powerd by Ollama
Implementation of Corrective RAG using LangChain and LangGraph.
Codes related to CRAG video

Training code for advanced RAG techniques - Adaptive-RAG, Corrective RAG, RQ-RAG, Self-RAG, Agentic RAG, and ReZero. Reproduces paper methodologies to fine-tune LLMs via SFT and GRPO for adaptive retrieval, corrective evaluation, query refinement, self-reflection, and agentic search behaviors.
This project displays the open source LLM's power with a technique called Corrective RAG using graph analogy of Lang graph.

Investigating the efficacy of Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Corrective Retrieval-Augmented Generation (CRAG) in harnessing external knowledge to improve AI model performance and output quality.

Corrective Retrieval-Augmented Generation (CRAG) is an advanced framework designed to improve the robustness and accuracy of standard RAG systems. It addresses the vulnerability of traditional RAG, which can suffer from poor performance when retrieving irrelevant, noisy, or incorrect documents.
A repository to learn & explore the CRAG - A better version of RAG.
A sophisticated RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system that implements Corrective RAG with hybrid retrieval, reranking, and web search fallback capabilities.
Personal second brain with Corrective RAG — multi-query retrieval, batched grading, web search fallback, cross-encoder reranking, and a Streamlit chat UI for querying Markdown notes.

Projeto de Corrective RAG (CRAG) usando LangChain, LangGraph, ChromaDB, OpenAI e Tavily.  A aplicação recebe uma pergunta, decide se deve consultar uma base vetorial local ou buscar na web, avalia a relevância dos documentos recuperados, gera uma resposta a partir do contexto e usa graders para verificar se a resposta está apoiada nos documentos

Banking AI Copilot using CRAG (Corrective RAG) with FastAPI, LangChain, FAISS, and Streamlit. The system performs self-reflective retrieval, query rewriting, compliance checks, fraud/KYC support, and structured loan-rate lookups with guardrails.
DecisionLens: A Corrective RAG Engine for IFAB/FIFA Rule Compliance and VAR Transparency

Imagine a website where users can skip complex navigation and get instant answers with just a question. This project explores how a Corrective-Retrieval-Augmented Generation (CRAG) chatbot reduces server load and network congestion by streamlining interactions-enhancing both efficiency and user experience in a way traditional navigation can't.
Corrective RAG with hybrid vector search (Dense + Sparse + RRF) — Standard and CRAG modes, optional reranking, FastAPI + Qdrant + OpenAI
Repo for NAACL 2025 Paper "Unfolding the Headline: Iterative Self-Questioning for News Retrieval and Timeline Summarization"
Open-source memory runtime for AI agents — reproducible, provenance-tagged context bundles instead of query-time retrieval. Apache-2.0, self-hosted on Postgres + pgvector, Python + TypeScript SDKs.
Governed shared memory for AI agent fleets — multi-agent, multi-tenant, MCP-native. Trust tiers, keystone policies, audit trails, knowledge graph, self-improving retrieval. Apache 2.0.
[ICLR 2025] InstructRAG: Instructing Retrieval-Augmented Generation via Self-Synthesized Rationales

A comprehensive catalog of 34 Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) techniques. Features Python pseudocode, pros/cons, and architecture concepts ranging from basic retrieval to advanced agentic RAG, GraphRAG, and self-correcting workflows.

AL Airways Smart Assistant is a Retrieval-Augmented NLP chatbot developed using a self-created airline dataset. It answers passenger queries by retrieving information from custom policy PDFs and generating accurate, human-like responses.

Sample for context-aware Agentic RaG, Q&A with multi-source verification, and self-curating knowledge base. Powered by Azure AI Foundry Agent Service, Azure AI Search with agentic retrieval and query rewrite, Semantic Kernel and LangGraph agents running in Azure Container Apps, and ready for Copilot Studio
Airgapped closed-corpus QA loop: a self-hosted Qwen3.6 agent explores a .zip dataroom under a token budget with local tools

This project implements a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system using an open-source stack. It utilizes BioMistral 7B as the main model along with other technologies such as PubMedBert for embedding, Qdrant for a self-hosted Vector DB, and Langchain & Llama CPP for orchestration frameworks.
[ACL'26 Main Conference] Retrieval as Generation: A Unified Framework with Self-Triggered Information Planning
EU AI Act Compliance Navigator — RAG-based compliance assessment with semantic retrieval, self-query routing, and multilingual support
This project implements a Reinforcement Learning (RL) enhanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that optimizes document retrieval for question answering tasks.
[NAACL 2025] Official Code Repository for the paper "Probing-RAG: Self-Probing to Guide Language Models in Selective Document Retrieval"

An external memory for LLMs: a bi-temporal knowledge graph with hybrid (keyword + vector) retrieval and a self-improving reflection loop. Benchmarked to beat flat vector RAG on corrections and time-versioned queries.

This project implements a production-ready Self-Healing RAG system that goes beyond traditional retrieval-augmented generation. Unlike standard RAG's fragile open-loop architecture, this system implements closed-loop feedback at every stage to autonomously detect and correct errors.
AI Agent Engineering Platform built on an Open Source TypeScript AI Agent Framework
One portable memory layer for every AI agent: local-first, Markdown-native, user-owned, and self-evolving across apps, tools, and workflows.
Deeplake is AI Data Runtime for Agents. It provides serverless postgres with a multimodal datalake, enabling scalable retrieval and training.

results.description: The AI-native database built for LLM applications, providing incredibly fast hybrid search of dense vector, sparse vector, tensor (multi-vector), and full-text.

Ask questions across your Markdown notes using a fully local Graph RAG engine. Built for Obsidian vaults, works with any folder of Markdown files. Extracts entity-relation triples from wikilinks & YAML frontmatter, retrieves answers via hybrid search (vector + BM25 + temporal). Multilingual. No cloud. Runs on Ollama.
Local-first, zero-key semantic code search for large and custom codebases — hybrid vector + keyword retrieval with symbol-aware chunking. Usable as a CLI, Python library, REST API, or web UI.

Production-grade RAG API built in Rust. Hybrid search with HNSW dense vectors and BM25 sparse matching, cross-encoder reranking, layout-aware document extraction via Docling, and 94.5% accuracy on Open RAG Bench. Powered by Cerebras, Groq, Milvus, and Jina AI.

RAG boilerplate with semantic/propositional chunking, hybrid search (BM25 + dense), LLM reranking, query enhancement agents, CrewAI orchestration, Qdrant vector search, Redis/Mongo sessioning, Celery ingestion pipeline, Gradio UI, and an evaluation suite (Hit-Rate, MRR, hybrid configs).

A local-first Chrome extension that passively captures ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Grok, Perplexity conversations into a private memory graph. Features in-browser Hybrid RAG (Vector + BM25), semantic search, and 100% privacy via WebAssembly and IndexedDB. No servers, no API keys.
Semantic code search plugin for Claude Code  using hybrid vector search + BM25. 98% accuracy, 5x faster than grep.
Hybrid RAG Worker on Cloudflare Edge — Vector + BM25 search, metadata filtering, multimodal vision, MCP server, and intelligent query routing. ~400ms p99.

A Rust-based Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides AI assistants with powerful RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) capabilities for understanding massive codebases. Index codebases with FastEmbed + LanceDB, semantic code and git history searches with hybrid vector + BM25.

Enterprise RAG application on Azure with Azure AI hybrid search (vector + semantic + BM25), NDJSON streaming,   MSAL SSO, and Fluent UI 9. Features document ingestion pipeline, project isolation, citation attribution, and   multi-service architecture (FastAPI + Azure Functions + React).

CLI tool for building production RAG systems from Markdown, CSV, and PDF documents using hybrid search (BM25 + vector) with OpenSearch. Features MCP server, Slack bot, Web UI, multi-source ingestion (local/S3/GitHub), and multi-provider embeddings (Bedrock/Gemini).
Improved RAG retrieval by adding context to the chunks and performing Hybrid Search (Vector Semantic Search + BM25 Keyword Search) and Reranking.
Local-first long-term memory for AI coding tools — causal graphs, hybrid BM25+vector search, 2.46x context augmentation
Hybrid and agentic search. BM25, vector retrieval, reranking, and multi-turn search in a lightweight Rust CLI and library
Hot-hatch hybrid vector + BM25 search for PostgreSQL on top of pgvector
Build, Evaluate, and Optimize AI Systems. Includes evals, RAG, agents, fine-tuning, synthetic data generation, dataset management, MCP, and more.
Synthetic datasets, experiment protocols, and evaluation code for "Governed Memory: A Production Architecture for Multi-Agent Workflows"
LangChain, Llama2-Chat, and zero- and few-shot prompting are used to generate synthetic datasets for IR and RAG system evaluation
Evaluation dataset and results for Developer Lightspeed — includes RAG source docs, synthetically generated Q&A pairs via Ragas, and benchmarked performance metrics across multiple LLMs.

A fully offline, beginner-friendly lab for evaluating Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems. Includes synthetic datasets, embeddings + vector search, retrieval metrics (Recall@k, Precision@k, MRR), and optional simulated answer generation + judge scoring.

A tool for generating synthetic test datasets to evaluate RAG systems using RAGAS and OpenAI. Features automated question-answer pair generation with customizable complexity levels and easy CSV export.
Synthetic multi-table RAG QA telemetry benchmark (corpus→chunks→retrieval→eval): labels for correctness/faithfulness/hallucination + cost/latency for RAG evaluation and dashboards.

Toolkit for a complete offline RAG application, from creation to synthetic dataset generation, evaluation, and tracing. Features LLM & retriever configuration, built-in RAGAS metrics evaluation, LLM comparisons, result visualization, and tracing.

Systematic generation, processing, and evaluation of synthetic Question-Answering (QA) datasets. This work is part of an academic research initiative aimed at developing rigorous evaluation methodologies for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems applied to specialized domains, such as educational content
Quickly generate synthetic evaluation datasets for RAG projects
PandaChat-RAG benchmark for evaluation of RAG systems on a non-synthetic Slovenian test dataset.
Generate synthetic test datasets from source documents for RAG evaluation using knowledge graphs, personas, and query synthesizers

AI teams building RAG on complex documents — financial filings, legal contracts, technical manuals — have no reliable way to generate evaluation datasets at scale. Manual annotation is too slow and misses document-structure edge cases (multi-row tables, cross-page clauses). This pipeline automates it with a quality gate.
📊 Lightweight RAG pipeline benchmarking — synthetic datasets, deterministic retrieval+generation metrics, reproducible scorecards. Framework-agnostic, zero core deps.
Evaluate RAG systems for CRM and customer-support use cases with synthetic datasets and business-risk scoring

Security proxy for AI agents. Scans every message for prompt injection, PII, and secrets. Defense-in-depth: Go proxy + iptables firewall + eBPF kernel monitor. YAML policy engine, audit logging, 5 AI agents with RAG knowledge bases.
Enterprise AI Security Platform - Real-time firewall protection for LLM applications against prompt injection, data leakage, and function abuse attacks
Protect your AI from Prompt Injection
Security working agreements for AI coding agents: hardened AGENTS.md, prompt/tool-injection guardrails, dependency hygiene, Scorecard-ready OSS setup
Comprehensive resource on Generative AI security — prompt injection, jailbreaking, RAG security, red teaming, guardrails, and more. One folder per topic.
Lightweight prompt-injection detector built for AI agents, copilots, and LLM apps. Fast, local, calibrated.

SecureAI-Scan is a CLI tool that scans TypeScript and JavaScript codebases for security issues specific to AI-powered apps — prompt injection, MCP tool abuse, RAG data poisoning, agent trust violations, and more.
Initial research on RAG Poisoning and Prompt Injection with detectors and a POC for poisoning.

Damn Vulnerable AI - Hands-on AI security training platform. Various challenges across 12 categories covering the full OWASP LLM Top 10. Prompt injection, adversarial ML, RAG attacks, model supply chain, agentic AI exploitation & more. Works 100% offline.
RAG Security: Vektör veritabanlarının karanlık yüzü! RAG poisoning, dolaylı prompt injection ve embedding inversiyon saldırılarını gerçek dünya senaryolarıyla inceleyen kapsamlı rehber.
An AI Security Testing Playbook with labs for prompt injection, RAG poisoning, and tool attacks
Fast, local prompt-injection & jailbreak guardrail for LlamaIndex RAG — blocks attacks before retrieval. Powered by Bastion Prompt Protection (ONNX, ~5 ms, fully offline)

Think like an attacker. Ship like a defender. — Open-source SKILL.md packs for hardening LLM systems: prompt injection, RAG security, tool execution, data leakage & governance. Framework-aware (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Semantic Kernel) and language-portable. Built for engineers who ship to production.

LLM Sentinel Red Teaming Platform is an enterprise-grade framework for automated security testing of Large Language Models, detecting vulnerabilities such as jailbreaks, prompt injection, and system prompt leakage across multiple providers, with structured attack orchestration, risk scoring, and security reporting to harden models before production
Security case study: RAG prompt injection on AWS Bedrock Knowledge Bases + layered mitigations (retrieval scoping + output gating).
Semantic cache for LLMs. Fully integrated with LangChain and llama_index.
A LLM semantic caching system aiming to enhance user experience by reducing response time via cached query-result pairs.
[ICLR'26] The official code implementation for "Cache-to-Cache: Direct Semantic Communication Between Large Language Models"
A fuzzy key value store based on semantic similarity rather lexical equality.
Cut LLM costs by up to 80% and unlock sub-millisecond responses with intelligent semantic caching.A drop-in, provider-agnostic LLM proxy written in Go with sub-millisecond response

AI-powered analysis engine for Argentine government open   data. Multi-agent pipeline (LangGraph) with 10 data   connectors, NL2SQL, semantic caching, and real-time   streaming. Built with FastAPI, PostgreSQL + pgvector,   Celery, and Gemini/Claude LLMs.
mimir is a drop-in proxy that caches LLM API responses using semantic similarity, reducing costs and latency for repeated or similar queries.
SmarterRouter: An intelligent LLM gateway and VRAM-aware router for Ollama, llama.cpp, and OpenAI. Features semantic caching, model profiling, and automatic failover for local AI labs.
Semantic caching layer for your LLM applications. Reuse responses and reduce token usage.
Reliable and Efficient Semantic Prompt Caching with vCache
A simple semantic cache implementaion. It caches responses from an LLM based on semantic similarity.
ClusterKV: Manipulating LLM KV Cache in  Semantic Space for Recallable Compression (DAC'25)
RAMen is a fast in-memory data store like Redis, but built for AI: drop-in Redis protocol, native vector search, semantic caching, and a built-in MCP server for agents. Single Go binary, BSD-3.
A Distributed Semantic Cache Service for LLM applications - Multi-node, MCP-compatible, Written in Rust!
Enterprise AI traffic gateway — unified compliance, routing across 20+ LLM providers, semantic cache, quotas, and audit. SDK / network / OS-layer intercept.
One portable memory layer for every AI agent: local-first, Markdown-native, user-owned, and self-evolving across apps, tools, and workflows.
Deeplake is AI Data Runtime for Agents. It provides serverless postgres with a multimodal datalake, enabling scalable retrieval and training.

A smart PDF parsing pipeline featuring dynamic routing, broken table stitching, and Human-in-the-Loop for high-quality RAG data extraction.

This is a RAG Microservice Backend built using Redis (to cache conversations), Postgres/pgvector (as the vector store), the Unstructured library (to aid in table/image extraction in PDFs), LangChain, OpenAI API, and FastAPI.
pdfalign is a very simple tool to grid align extracted pdf text. This is useful for invoice table extraction or further processing with llms / rag systems

The PDF Chatbot project uses advanced NLP models and Unstructured.io for parsing complex PDFs, enabling streamlined extraction and querying of information, including tables, graphs, and images, through a user-friendly interface.

An advanced PDF-to-knowledge chatbot built with LangChain + LangGraph, featuring hybrid semantic/keyword search (OpenSearch) and web-augmented answers via Serper API, supporting multimodal extraction of text, tables, and images through a modern React + FastAPI interface.

Open Source RAG ETL Platform. Turns PDFs, Docs & Slides into queryable vectors. Features a unified Python AI Worker, Hybrid Search (Qdrant), and bi-directional Google Drive Sync. Supports OCR, Table extraction, and Layout-aware chunking. Self-hosted Docker solution for complete data privacy and enterprise performance.
Two-stage Docling + VLM pipeline: PDF/DOCX → Markdown, with formula/image/table extraction (cropped screenshots) and LLM-generated descriptions inserted back for RAG-ready docs.

InsightForgeAI~Is Agentic Rag & FastAPI-based backend with a PDF ETL pipeline (text + table extraction), Using RAG and Vector Store. Utilizes Llama Indexfor multi-step RAG orchestration and Python tools for deterministic computations, delivering citation-backed answers with structured reasoning traces for complex queries.
PDF table extraction for RAG — convert to clean HTML. Fast, local, no GPU.

A pipeline to extract structured (tables) and unstructured (text) data from PDF files and answer questions using Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG). Uses PDFMiner/Docling for extraction, SentenceTransformer for embeddings, FAISS for vector search, and GPT/Ollama as the language model for generating final answers.

An intelligent document analysis tool powered by RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation). Features include PDF/DOCX summarization, interactive Q&A, table extraction, and grammar analysis using LangChain, FastAPI, and ChromaDB.

Production-grade Enterprise RAG | FastAPI + LangGraph + pgvector | Hybrid BM25+Dense Search | RRF | Cross-Encoder Reranker | JWT RBAC | Semantic Cache | Multi-turn Chat | S3 Event Ingestion | PDF+DOCX Table Extraction | RAGAS Eval | Langfuse Tracing
PDF Catalog to RAG-Optimized Markdown converter. Docling + pdfplumber extraction with table-aware chunking, part number preservation, and built-in web interface.

A multimodal pipeline for ingesting and processing complex PDFs containing text, tables, formulas, images, and captions. Uses DocLayout-YOLO for layout-aware extraction and builds a unified structure for downstream semantic retrieval (RAG).

Agentic Rag & FastAPI-based backend with a PDF ETL pipeline (text + table extraction), Using RAG and Vector Store. 🧠 Context Engineering is an open-source toolkit to visualize, test, and optimize how LLMs process context windows. Includes a Streamlit app, RAG simulation, educational docs, and Docker support—perfect for prompt engineers, researchers, and AI developers.
Unified MCP context intelligence platform — pip-installable CLI that absorbed 6 foundational repos. Context engineering for AI agents.
🧠 Enable Claude to handle long inputs using Recursive Language Models that recursively analyze data beyond standard context limits.
📄 Enhance document processing by implementing Recursive Language Models with Claude Code to exceed typical context limits and manage larger inputs effectively.

Rust CLI implementing the Recursive Language Model (RLM) pattern for Claude Code. Process documents 100x larger than context windows through intelligent chunking, SQLite persistence, and recursive sub-LLM orchestration.

MERN hospital management system with role-based portals (admin/doctor/patient), a blood bank module, and an online pharmacy. Includes a RAG-based AI assistant - MiniLM embeddings, parent-child chunking, MongoDB Atlas vector search - that answers from live hospital data and auto-refreshes when records change. Dockerized for deployment.
Reducing Hallucination in Low-Resource Medical NLP Pipelines

A practical guide to 6 document chunking strategies for RAG and LLM applications — Document, Fixed-Size, Recursive, Sentence, Semantic, and Agentic chunking with working code and plain-English explanations.

An AI-powered Document Q&A system built with FastAPI, React, and Groq. Features Hybrid Search (pgvector + FTS), Semantic & Parent-Child Chunking, Cross-Encoder Reranking, and Llama-3.3 for highly accurate, cited answers.

Production-grade Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) reference architecture backend utilizing FastAPI, pgvector, Qdrant, Pinecone, and LangChain, featuring zero-trust PII masking, hierarchical parsing, semantic chunking, multi-stage retrieval, and mathematical response verification.
Turn speech into semantic paragraphs in real time, on a CPU (no GPU) — single-pass streaming chunker + Moonshine STT + a live mic demo. Plus a transcribe/chunk/summarize API.

candidates.description: Fast, AI-agent-native code search in Rust — hybrid BM25 + semantic, Tree-sitter AST chunking, dependency & impact analysis. Drop-in replacement for grep/cat/read/ls in Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Aider, OpenHands.

Security proxy for AI agents. Scans every message for prompt injection, PII, and secrets. Defense-in-depth: Go proxy + iptables firewall + eBPF kernel monitor. YAML policy engine, audit logging, 5 AI agents with RAG knowledge bases.
Completely local RAG. Chat with your PDF documents (with open LLM) and UI to that uses LangChain, Streamlit, Ollama (Llama 3.1), Qdrant and advanced methods like reranking and semantic chunking.
Corrective RAG demo powerd by Ollama
A curated list of awesome open-source libraries for context engineering (Long-term memory, MCP: Model Context Protocol, Prompt/RAG Compression, Multi-Agent)
Deprecated/unmaintained Postgres extensions to support end-to-end Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines
Semantic caching layer for your LLM applications. Reuse responses and reduce token usage.
A tiny 1000 line implementation of GraphRAG in Python
Context Engineering: Build Consistent, Accurate, Predictable AI Systems

Odin Runes, a java-based GPT client, facilitates interaction with your preferred GPT model right through your favorite text editor. There is more: It also facilitates prompt-engineering by extracting context from diverse sources using technologies such as OCR, enhancing overall productivity and saving costs.
The RAG Genie, an LLM RAG prototype to test and evaluate your embeddings, chunk splitting strategies using Q&A and evaluations.
LLM RAG Application with Cross-Encoders Re-ranking for YouTube video 🎥

The Map Everyone's Missing: LLM Knowledge Engineering in 2026 — First unified guide connecting RAG, Context Engineering, Harness Engineering, Skill Systems, Agent Memory, MCP, and Progressive Disclosure
We believe that every SOTA result is only valid on its own dataset. RAGView provides a unified evaluation platform to benchmark different RAG methods on your specific data.

RAG boilerplate with semantic/propositional chunking, hybrid search (BM25 + dense), LLM reranking, query enhancement agents, CrewAI orchestration, Qdrant vector search, Redis/Mongo sessioning, Celery ingestion pipeline, Gradio UI, and an evaluation suite (Hit-Rate, MRR, hybrid configs).
A naive implementation of GraphRAG for Movie Recommendation on IMDB Top 1000 movies dataset.
Reliable and Efficient Semantic Prompt Caching with vCache

A comprehensive catalog of 34 Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) techniques. Features Python pseudocode, pros/cons, and architecture concepts ranging from basic retrieval to advanced agentic RAG, GraphRAG, and self-correcting workflows.
Enterprise RAG ecosystem managing 15,000+ semantic chunks. Features hybrid parsing (LlamaParse/PyMuPDF) and 256-dim MRL embeddings for 512MB RAM environments

A Go library implementation of LightRAG - an advanced Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system that uniquely combines vector databases with graph database relationships to enhance knowledge retrieval.
Turn speech into semantic paragraphs in real time, on a CPU (no GPU) — single-pass streaming chunker + Moonshine STT + a live mic demo. Plus a transcribe/chunk/summarize API.
Multi-tenant RAG API powered by LightRAG/RAG-Anything. Auto-selects best parser (DeepSeek-OCR/MinerU/Docling) via complexity scoring
基于LightRAG+Deepseek API框架的知识图谱测试
Code implementation for DyG-RAG: Dynamic Graph Retrieval-Augmented Generation with Event-Centric Reasoning.
A MCP server that is a locally running knowledge base with a hybrid vector and graph RAG engine using LightRAG

Rust CLI implementing the Recursive Language Model (RLM) pattern for Claude Code. Process documents 100x larger than context windows through intelligent chunking, SQLite persistence, and recursive sub-LLM orchestration.
为酒馆用户搭建LightRAG并连接酒馆，以实现更先进更好用的RAG+酒馆（目前与另一个仓库同步开发中）

AL Airways Smart Assistant is a Retrieval-Augmented NLP chatbot developed using a self-created airline dataset. It answers passenger queries by retrieving information from custom policy PDFs and generating accurate, human-like responses.

A local-first Chrome extension that passively captures ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Grok, Perplexity conversations into a private memory graph. Features in-browser Hybrid RAG (Vector + BM25), semantic search, and 100% privacy via WebAssembly and IndexedDB. No servers, no API keys.
Testing speed and accuracy of RAG with, and without Cross Encoder Reranker.
Synthetic datasets, experiment protocols, and evaluation code for "Governed Memory: A Production Architecture for Multi-Agent Workflows"

Sample for context-aware Agentic RaG, Q&A with multi-source verification, and self-curating knowledge base. Powered by Azure AI Foundry Agent Service, Azure AI Search with agentic retrieval and query rewrite, Semantic Kernel and LangGraph agents running in Azure Container Apps, and ready for Copilot Studio

An advanced retrieval system that combines semantic vector search with token-based search, using contextual chunking and knowledge graphs to improve accuracy. It ensures precise query responses with LLM-based answer checking and graph visualization.
A minimal implementation of GraphRAG, designed to quickly prototype whether you're able to get good sense-making out of a large dataset with creation of a knowledge graph.
Airgapped closed-corpus QA loop: a self-hosted Qwen3.6 agent explores a .zip dataroom under a token budget with local tools
A GCP native, modular, parallelized Graph RAG implementation.
A simple semantic cache implementaion. It caches responses from an LLM based on semantic similarity.

This project implements a RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) system using an open-source stack. It utilizes BioMistral 7B as the main model along with other technologies such as PubMedBert for embedding, Qdrant for a self-hosted Vector DB, and Langchain & Llama CPP for orchestration frameworks.
Reliable RAG setup that uses Semantic Double Merging Chunking from llamaindex, Qdrant Hybrid Search, colBERT for reranking and Google Gemini as LLM.
